instruction: In Apple Notes, edit the note titled "Project Ideas" and append the line "Reviewed on Tuesday.".
reference_command:
note_index=$(memo notes | awk '/^[0-9]+\./ { idx=$1; sub(/\./, "", idx); line=$0; sub(/^[0-9]+\. /, "", line); n=split(line, parts, " - "); title=parts[n]; if (title == "Project Ideas") { print idx; exit } }')
if [ -z "$note_index" ]; then
  echo "Note not found: Project Ideas"
  exit 1
fi
cat > /tmp/memo_auto_edit.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
file="$1"

cat > "$file" <<'TXT'
Project Ideas

Initial draft
Reviewed on Tuesday.
TXT
EOF

chmod +x /tmp/memo_auto_edit.sh
printf '%s\n' "$note_index" | env EDITOR=/tmp/memo_auto_edit.sh memo notes --edit
